sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1
items.html: The lights that are extended from Ein Sof to the lower Sefirot necessarily pass through the upper Sefirot. Since the spiritual does not become absent from one place when it moves to another place, but remains existing both in place A and in place B, we distinguish two kinds of light in each Sefira: lights of their own phase, and the lights that remained in them “in passing.”
